revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:May 25 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of May 25 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦5月25日'''は[[旧暦]][[5月 (旧暦)|5月]]の25日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[嘉応]]2年（[[1170年]]_月_日） - 奥州の[[藤原秀衡]]が朝廷から[[鎮守府]]将軍に任命される * [[正慶]]2年/[[元弘]]3年（[[1333年]]_月_日） - 北朝の[[光厳天皇]]が南朝の[[後醍醐天皇]]に譲位し一旦[[南北朝時代 (日本)|南北朝]]が合一 * [[正慶]]5年/[[延元]]元年（[[1336年]]_月_日） - [[湊川の戦い]]。[[足利尊氏]]が[[楠木正成]]を破る。正成は一族とともに自害
== 誕生日 == * [[嘉吉]]2年（[[1442年]]_月_日） - [[後土御門天皇]]、103代[[天皇]]（+ [[1500年]]） * [[承応]]3年（[[1654年]][[7月9日]]） - [[霊元天皇]]、112代天皇（+ [[1732年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[康保]]4年（[[967年]]_月_日） - [[村上天皇]]、62代天皇（* [[926年]]） * [[正慶]]5年/[[延元]]元年（[[1336年]]_月_日） - [[楠木正成]]、[[武将]]（* [[1294年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[5月24日 (旧暦)|5月24日]] 翌日[[5月26日 (旧暦)|5月26日]] - 前月[[4月25日 (旧暦)|4月25日]] 翌月[[6月25日 (旧暦)|6月25日]] *新暦[[5月25日]]
{{msg:stub}}

== できごと == * [[嘉応]]2年（[[1170年]]_月_日） - 奥州の[[藤原秀衡]]が朝廷から[[鎮守府]]将軍に任命される * [[正慶]]2年/[[元弘]]3年（[[1333年]]_月_日） - 北朝の[[光厳天皇]]が南朝の[[後醍醐天皇]]に譲位し一旦[[南北朝時代 (日本)|南北朝]]が合一 * [[正慶]]5年/[[延元]]元年（[[1336年]]_月_日） - [[湊川の戦い]]。[[足利尊氏]]が[[楠木正成]]を破る。正成は一族とともに自害
== 誕生日 == * [[嘉吉]]2年（[[1442年]]_月_日） - [[後土御門天皇]]、103代[[天皇]]（+ [[1500年]]） * [[承応]]3年（[[1654年]][[7月9日]]） - [[霊元天皇]]、112代天皇（+ [[1732年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[康保]]4年（[[967年]]_月_日） - [[村上天皇]]、62代天皇（* [[926年]]） * [[正慶]]5年/[[延元]]元年（[[1336年]]_月_日） - [[楠木正成]]、[[武将]]（* [[1294年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{旧暦360日}} *前日[[5月24日 (旧暦)|5月24日]] 翌日[[5月26日 (旧暦)|5月26日]] - 前月[[4月25日 (旧暦)|4月25日]] 翌月[[6月25日 (旧暦)|6月25日]] *新暦[[5月25日]]
{{stub}}

{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月25日'''は[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の25日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[嘉応]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1170年]][[7月10日]]） - 奥州の[[藤原秀衡]]が朝廷から[[鎮守府]]将軍に任命される * [[正慶]]2年/[[元弘]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1333年]][[7月7日]]） - 北朝の[[光厳天皇]]が南朝の[[後醍醐天皇]]に譲位し一旦[[南北朝時代 (日本)|南北朝]]が合一 * [[正慶]]5年/[[延元]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1336年]][[5月6日]]） - [[湊川の戦い]]。[[足利尊氏]]が[[楠木正成]]を破る。正成は一族とともに自害
== 誕生日 == * [[嘉吉]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1442年]][[7月3日]]） - [[後土御門天皇]]、103代[[天皇]]（+ [[1500年]]） * [[承応]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1654年]][[7月9日]]） - [[霊元天皇]]、112代天皇（+ [[1732年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[康保]]4年（ユリウス暦[[967年]][[7月5日]]） - [[村上天皇]]、62代天皇（* [[926年]]） * 正慶5年/延元元年（ユリウス暦1336年5月6日） - 楠木正成、[[武将]]（* [[1294年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|24|5|26|4|25|6|5|0525}}

== 忌日 == * [[康保]]4年（ユリウス暦[[967年]][[7月5日]]） - [[村上天皇]]、62代天皇（* [[926年]]） * 正慶5年/延元元年（ユリウス暦1336年5月6日） - 楠木正成、[[武将]]（* [[1294年]]）

[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:5月25日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar May]][[sn:May 25日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] {{citation needed}}
{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:大安]] [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:May 25 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]]

'''May 25 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar May}} ''May 25'''<!--Lunar May25--> is the Nth day of 、[[5月 (旧暦)|Lunar May]]の25日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]][[Category:大安]]である。
== Events == * [[嘉応]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1170年]][[7月10日]]） - 奥州の[[藤原秀衡]]が朝廷から[[鎮守府将軍]]に任命される * [[正慶]]2年/[[元弘]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1333年]][[7月7日]]） - 北朝の[[光厳天皇]]が南朝の[[後醍醐天皇]]に譲位し一旦[[南北朝時代 (日本)|南北朝]]が合一 * [[正慶]]5年/[[延元]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1336年]][[7月4日]]） - [[湊川の戦い]]。[[足利尊氏]]が[[楠木正成]]を破る。正成は一族とともに自害
== Births == * [[嘉吉]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1442年]][[7月3日]]） - [[後土御門天皇]]、103代[[天皇]]（+ [[1500年]]） * [[承応]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1654年]][[7月9日]]） - [[霊元天皇]]、112代天皇（+ [[1732年]]） * [[天明]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1782年]][[7月5日]]） - [[会沢正志斎]]、[[水戸藩]]の[[儒学者]]（+ [[1863年]]）
== Deaths == * [[康保]]4年（ユリウス暦[[967年]][[7月5日]]） - [[村上天皇]]、62代天皇（* [[926年]]） * 正慶5年/延元元年（ユリウス暦1336年7月4日） - 楠木正成、[[武将]]（* [[1294年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|24|5|26|4|25|6|5|0525}}
[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:5月25日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar May]][[sn:May 25日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] {{citation needed}}
{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:大安]] [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:May 25 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]]

{{Lunar May}} '''May 25 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar May}} ''May 25'''<!--Lunar May25--> is the Nth day of 、[[5月 (旧暦)|Lunar May]]の25日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]][[Category:大安]]である。
== Events == * [[嘉応]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1170年]][[7月10日]]） - 奥州の[[藤原秀衡]]が朝廷から[[鎮守府将軍]]に任命される * [[正慶]]2年/[[元弘]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1333年]][[7月7日]]） - 北朝の[[光厳天皇]]が南朝の[[後醍醐天皇]]に譲位し一旦[[南北朝時代 (日本)|南北朝]]が合一 * [[正慶]]5年/[[延元]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1336年]][[7月4日]]） - [[湊川の戦い]]。[[足利尊氏]]が[[楠木正成]]を破る。正成は一族とともに自害
== Births == * [[嘉吉]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1442年]][[7月3日]]） - [[後土御門天皇]]、103代[[天皇]]（+ [[1500年]]） * [[承応]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1654年]][[7月9日]]） - [[霊元天皇]]、112代天皇（+ [[1732年]]） * [[天明]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1782年]][[7月5日]]） - [[会沢正志斎]]、[[水戸藩]]の[[儒学者]]（+ [[1863年]]）
== Deaths == * [[康保]]4年（ユリウス暦[[967年]][[7月5日]]） - [[村上天皇]]、62代天皇（* [[926年]]） * 正慶5年/延元元年（ユリウス暦1336年7月4日） - 楠木正成、[[武将]]（* [[1294年]]）
== Commemorations ==

== Births == * [[嘉吉]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1442年]][[7月3日]]） - [[後土御門天皇]]、103代[[天皇]]（+ [[1500年]]） * [[承応]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1654年]][[7月9日]]） - [[霊元天皇]]、112代天皇（+ [[1732年]]） * [[天明]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1782年]][[7月5日]]） - [[会沢正志斎]]、[[水戸藩]]の[[儒学者]]（+ [[1863年]]）
== Deaths == * [[康保]]4年（ユリウス暦[[967年]][[7月5日]]） - [[村上天皇]]、62代天皇（* [[926年]]） * 正慶5年/延元元年（ユリウス暦1336年7月4日） - 楠木正成、[[武将]]（* [[1294年]]）
== Commemorations ==

removing the annoying spaces that make editing harder
putting this here so I can replace it to insert all necessary interlanguage links into it
doing a mass replace to get the proper intweriki links for all the dates

Copying from [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.text:
[[sn:May 25 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 25일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月25日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 25일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿五]] [[zh:五月廿五]] [[en:draft:May 25 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1170|ja|1170年}} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara Hidetaka|ja|藤原秀衡}} of Ōshū was appointed as {{ill|Chinju-fu Shogun|ja|鎮守府将軍|lt=Chinju-fu Shogun}} by the Imperial Court. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|正慶}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1333|ja|1333年}} {{ill|July 7|ja|7月7日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon}} of the Northern Court abdicated in favor of {{ill|Emperor Godaigo|ja|後醍醐天皇|lt=Emperor Godaigo}} of the Southern Court, temporarily uniting the Nanboku-chō period. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|正慶}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|延元}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336年}} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}}) – The {{ill|Battle of Minatogawa|ja|湊川の戦い|lt=Battle of Minatogawa}}: {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}} defeated {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成}}, who, along with his clan, committed suicide.
== Births == * {{ill|Kakki|ja|嘉吉}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1442|ja|1442年}} {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Gotomimon|ja|後土御門天皇}}, the 103rd Emperor (died {{ill|1500|ja|1500年}}). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654年}} {{ill|July 9|ja|7月9日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Reigen|ja|霊元天皇}}, the 112th Emperor (died {{ill|1732|ja|1732年}}). * {{ill|Tenmei|ja|天明}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1782|ja|1782年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}}) – {{ill|Aizawa Shōshisai|ja|会沢正志斎}}, a Confucian scholar of the Mito Domain (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōhō|ja|康保}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|967|ja|967年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Murakami|ja|村上天皇}}, the 62nd Emperor (born {{ill|926|ja|926年}}). * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|正慶}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|延元}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336年}} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}}) – {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成}}, a military commander (born {{ill|1294|ja|1294年}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|24|5|26|4|25|6|5|0525}}

[[sn:May 25 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 25일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月25日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 25일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿五]] [[zh:五月廿五]] [[en:draft:May 25 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1170|ja|1170年}} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara Hidetaka|ja|藤原秀衡}} of Ōshū was appointed as {{ill|Chinju-fu Shogun|ja|鎮守府将軍|lt=Chinju-fu Shogun}} by the Imperial Court. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|正慶}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1333|ja|1333年}} {{ill|July 7|ja|7月7日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon}} of the Northern Court abdicated in favor of {{ill|Emperor Godaigo|ja|後醍醐天皇|lt=Emperor Godaigo}} of the Southern Court, temporarily uniting the Nanboku-chō period. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|正慶}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|延元}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336年}} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}}) – The {{ill|Battle of Minatogawa|ja|湊川の戦い|lt=Battle of Minatogawa}}: {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}} defeated {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成}}, who, along with his clan, committed suicide.
== Births == * {{ill|Kakki|ja|嘉吉}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1442|ja|1442年}} {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Gotomimon|ja|後土御門天皇}}, the 103rd Emperor (died {{ill|1500|ja|1500年}}). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654年}} {{ill|July 9|ja|7月9日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Reigen|ja|霊元天皇}}, the 112th Emperor (died {{ill|1732|ja|1732年}}). * {{ill|Tenmei|ja|天明}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1782|ja|1782年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}}) – {{ill|Aizawa Shōshisai|ja|会沢正志斎}}, a Confucian scholar of the Mito Domain (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōhō|ja|康保}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|967|ja|967年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Murakami|ja|村上天皇}}, the 62nd Emperor (born {{ill|926|ja|926年}}). * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|正慶}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|延元}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336年}} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}}) – {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成}}, a military commander (born {{ill|1294|ja|1294年}}).

[[sn:May 25 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 25일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月25日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 25일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿五]] [[zh:五月廿五]] [[en:draft:May 25 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1170|ja|1170年}} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Hidetaka|ja|藤原秀衡}} of Ōshū was appointed as {{ill|Chinju-fu Shogun|ja|鎮守府将軍|lt=Chinju-fu Shogun}} by the Imperial Court. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1333|ja|1333年}} {{ill|July 7|ja|7月7日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon}} of the Northern Court abdicated in favor of {{ill|Emperor Godaigo|ja|後醍醐天皇|lt=Emperor Godaigo}} of the Southern Court, temporarily uniting the Nanboku-chō period. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|延元}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336年}} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Minatogawa|ja|湊川の戦い|lt=Battle of Minatogawa}} : {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}} defeated {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成}} , who, along with his clan, committed suicide.
== Births == * {{ill|Kakki|ja|Kakitsu}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1442|ja|1442年}} {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gotomimon|ja|後土御門天皇}} , the 103rd Emperor (died {{ill|1500|ja|1500年}} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654年}} {{ill|July 9|ja|7月9日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reigen|ja|霊元天皇}} , the 112th Emperor (died {{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} ). * {{ill|Tenmei|ja|天明}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1782|ja|1782年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} ) – {{ill|Aizawa Shōshisai|ja|会沢正志斎}} , a Confucian scholar of the Mito Domain (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōhō|ja|康保}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|967|ja|967年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Murakami|ja|村上天皇}} , the 62nd Emperor (born {{ill|926|ja|926年}} ). * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|延元}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336年}} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}} ) – {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1294|ja|1294年}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|24|5|26|4|25|6|5|0525}}

[[sn:May 25 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 25일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月25日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 25일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿五]] [[zh:五月廿五]] [[en:draft:May 25 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1170|ja|1170年}} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Hidetaka|ja|藤原秀衡}} of Ōshū was appointed as {{ill|Chinju-fu Shogun|ja|鎮守府将軍|lt=Chinju-fu Shogun}} by the Imperial Court. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1333|ja|1333年}} {{ill|July 7|ja|7月7日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon}} of the Northern Court abdicated in favor of {{ill|Emperor Godaigo|ja|後醍醐天皇|lt=Emperor Godaigo}} of the Southern Court, temporarily uniting the Nanboku-chō period. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|延元}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336年}} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Minatogawa|ja|湊川の戦い|lt=Battle of Minatogawa}} : {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}} defeated {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成}} , who, along with his clan, committed suicide.
== Births == * {{ill|Kakki|ja|Kakitsu}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1442|ja|1442年}} {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gotomimon|ja|後土御門天皇}} , the 103rd Emperor (died {{ill|1500|ja|1500年}} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654年}} {{ill|July 9|ja|7月9日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reigen|ja|霊元天皇}} , the 112th Emperor (died {{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} ). * {{ill|Tenmei|ja|天明}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1782|ja|1782年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} ) – {{ill|Aizawa Shōshisai|ja|会沢正志斎}} , a Confucian scholar of the Mito Domain (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōhō|ja|康保}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|967|ja|967年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Murakami|ja|村上天皇}} , the 62nd Emperor (born {{ill|926|ja|926年}} ). * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|延元}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336年}} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}} ) – {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1294|ja|1294年}} ).
== See Also ==

== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōhō|ja|康保}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|967|ja|967年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Murakami|ja|村上天皇}} , the 62nd Emperor (born {{ill|926|ja|926年}} ). * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|延元}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336年}} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}} ) – {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1294|ja|1294年}} ).

[[sn:May 25 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 25일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月25日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 25일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿五]] [[zh:五月廿五]] [[en:draft:May 25 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1170|ja|1170年}} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Hidetaka|ja|藤原秀衡}} of Ōshū was appointed as {{ill|Chinju-fu Shogun|ja|鎮守府将軍|lt=Chinju-fu Shogun}} by the Imperial Court. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1333|ja|1333年}} {{ill|July 7|ja|7月7日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon}} of the Northern Court abdicated in favor of {{ill|Emperor Godaigo|ja|後醍醐天皇|lt=Emperor Godaigo}} of the Southern Court, temporarily uniting the Nanboku-chō period. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|延元}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336年}} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Minatogawa|ja|湊川の戦い|lt=Battle of Minatogawa}} : {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}} defeated {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成}} , who, along with his clan, committed suicide.
== Births == * {{ill|Kakki|ja|Kakitsu}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1442|ja|1442年}} {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gotomimon|ja|後土御門天皇}} , the 103rd Emperor (died {{ill|1500|ja|1500年}} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654年}} {{ill|July 9|ja|7月9日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reigen|ja|霊元天皇}} , the 112th Emperor (died {{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} ). * {{ill|Tenmei|ja|天明}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1782|ja|1782年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} ) – {{ill|Aizawa Shōshisai|ja|会沢正志斎}} , a Confucian scholar of the Mito Domain (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōhō|ja|康保}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|967|ja|967年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Murakami|ja|村上天皇}} , the 62nd Emperor (born {{ill|926|ja|926年}} ). * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|延元}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336年}} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}} ) – {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1294|ja|1294年}} ).

[[sn:May 25 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 25일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月25日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 25일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿五]] [[zh:五月廿五]] [[en:draft:May 25 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1170|ja|1170年}} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Hidetaka|ja|藤原秀衡}} of Ōshū was appointed as {{ill|Chinju-fu Shogun|ja|鎮守府将軍|lt=Chinju-fu Shogun}} by the Imperial Court. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1333|ja|1333年}} {{ill|July 7|ja|7月7日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon}} of the Northern Court abdicated in favor of {{ill|Emperor Godaigo|ja|後醍醐天皇|lt=Emperor Godaigo}} of the Southern Court, temporarily uniting the Nanboku-chō period. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|延元}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336年}} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Minatogawa|ja|湊川の戦い|lt=Battle of Minatogawa}} : {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}} defeated {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成}} , who, along with his clan, committed suicide.
== Births == * {{ill|Kakki|ja|Kakitsu}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1442|ja|1442年}} {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gotomimon|ja|後土御門天皇}} , the 103rd Emperor (died {{ill|1500|ja|1500年}} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654年}} {{ill|July 9|ja|7月9日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reigen|ja|霊元天皇}} , the 112th Emperor (died {{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} ). * {{ill|Tenmei|ja|天明}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1782|ja|1782年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} ) – {{ill|Aizawa Shōshisai|ja|会沢正志斎}} , a Confucian scholar of the Mito Domain (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōhō|ja|康保}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|967|ja|967年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Murakami|ja|村上天皇}} , the 62nd Emperor (born {{ill|926|ja|926年}} ). * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|延元}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336年}} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}} ) – {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1294|ja|1294年}} ).

== Events == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1170|ja|1170年}} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Hidetaka|ja|藤原秀衡}} of Ōshū was appointed as {{ill|Chinju-fu Shogun|ja|鎮守府将軍|lt=Chinju-fu Shogun}} by the Imperial Court. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1333|ja|1333年}} {{ill|July 7|ja|7月7日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon}} of the Northern Court abdicated in favor of {{ill|Emperor Godaigo|ja|後醍醐天皇|lt=Emperor Godaigo}} of the Southern Court, temporarily uniting the Nanboku-chō period. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336年}} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Minatogawa|ja|湊川の戦い|lt=Battle of Minatogawa}} : {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji}} defeated {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成}} , who, along with his clan, committed suicide.
== Births == * {{ill|Kakki|ja|Kakitsu}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1442|ja|1442年}} {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gotomimon|ja|後土御門天皇}} , the 103rd Emperor (died {{ill|1500|ja|1500年}} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654年}} {{ill|July 9|ja|7月9日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reigen|ja|霊元天皇}} , the 112th Emperor (died {{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} ). * {{ill|Tenmei|ja|天明}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1782|ja|1782年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} ) – {{ill|Aizawa Shōshisai|ja|会沢正志斎}} , a Confucian scholar of the Mito Domain (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōhō|ja|康保}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|967|ja|967年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Murakami|ja|村上天皇}} , the 62nd Emperor (born {{ill|926|ja|926年}} ). * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336年}} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}} ) – {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1294|ja|1294年}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|24|5|26|4|25|6|5|0525}}

== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōhō|ja|康保}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|967|ja|967年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Murakami|ja|村上天皇}} , the 62nd Emperor (born {{ill|926|ja|926年}} ). * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336年}} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}} ) – {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1294|ja|1294年}} ).== See Also ==

[[sn:May 25 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 25일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月25日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 25일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿五]] [[zh:五月廿五]] [[en:draft:May 25 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1170|ja|1170年}} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Hidetaka|ja|藤原秀衡}} of Ōshū was appointed as {{ill|Chinju-fu Shogun|ja|鎮守府将軍|lt=Chinju-fu Shogun}} by the Imperial Court. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1333|ja|1333年}} {{ill|July 7|ja|7月7日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon}} of the Northern Court abdicated in favor of {{ill|Emperor Godaigo|ja|後醍醐天皇|lt=Emperor Godaigo}} of the Southern Court, temporarily uniting the Nanboku-chō period. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336年}} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Minatogawa|ja|湊川の戦い|lt=Battle of Minatogawa}} : {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji}} defeated {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成}} , who, along with his clan, committed suicide.
== Births == * {{ill|Kakki|ja|Kakitsu}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1442|ja|1442年}} {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gotomimon|ja|後土御門天皇}} , the 103rd Emperor (died {{ill|1500|ja|1500年}} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654年}} {{ill|July 9|ja|7月9日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reigen|ja|霊元天皇}} , the 112th Emperor (died {{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} ). * {{ill|Tenmei|ja|天明}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1782|ja|1782年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} ) – {{ill|Aizawa Shōshisai|ja|会沢正志斎}} , a Confucian scholar of the Mito Domain (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōhō|ja|康保}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|967|ja|967年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Murakami|ja|村上天皇}} , the 62nd Emperor (born {{ill|926|ja|926年}} ). * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336年}} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}} ) – {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1294|ja|1294年}} ). == See Also! ==

[[sn:May 25 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 25일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月25日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 25일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿五]] [[zh:五月廿五]] [[en:draft:May 25 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1170|ja|1170年}} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Hidetaka|ja|藤原秀衡}} of Ōshū was appointed as {{ill|Chinju-fu Shogun|ja|鎮守府将軍|lt=Chinju-fu Shogun}} by the Imperial Court. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1333|ja|1333rd year }} {{ill|July 7|ja|7月7日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon}} of the Northern Court abdicated in favor of {{ill|Emperor Godaigo|ja|後醍醐天皇|lt=Emperor Godaigo}} of the Southern Court, temporarily uniting the Nanboku-chō period. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336年}} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Minatogawa|ja|湊川の戦い|lt=Battle of Minatogawa}} : {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji}} defeated {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成}} , who, along with his clan, committed suicide.
== Births == * {{ill|Kakki|ja|Kakitsu}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1442|ja|1442nd year }} {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gotomimon|ja|後土御門天皇}} , the 103rd Emperor (died {{ill|1500|ja|1500年}} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654年}} {{ill|July 9|ja|7月9日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reigen|ja|霊元天皇}} , the 112th Emperor (died {{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year }} ). * {{ill|Tenmei|ja|天明}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1782|ja|1782nd year }} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} ) – {{ill|Aizawa Shōshisai|ja|会沢正志斎}} , a Confucian scholar of the Mito Domain (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōhō|ja|康保}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|967|ja|967年}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Murakami|ja|村上天皇}} , the 62nd Emperor (born {{ill|926|ja|926年}} ). * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336年}} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}} ) – {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1294|ja|1294年}} ). == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|24|5|26|4|25|6|5|0525}}

== Events == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1170|ja|1170th year }} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Hidetaka|ja|藤原秀衡}} of Ōshū was appointed as {{ill|Chinju-fu Shogun|ja|鎮守府将軍|lt=Chinju-fu Shogun}} by the Imperial Court. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1333|ja|1333rd year }} {{ill|July 7|ja|7月7日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon}} of the Northern Court abdicated in favor of {{ill|Emperor Godaigo|ja|後醍醐天皇|lt=Emperor Godaigo}} of the Southern Court, temporarily uniting the Nanboku-chō period. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336年}} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Minatogawa|ja|湊川の戦い|lt=Battle of Minatogawa}} : {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji}} defeated {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成}} , who, along with his clan, committed suicide.
== Births == * {{ill|Kakki|ja|Kakitsu}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1442|ja|1442nd year }} {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gotomimon|ja|後土御門天皇}} , the 103rd Emperor (died {{ill|1500|ja|1500th year }} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654th year }} {{ill|July 9|ja|7月9日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reigen|ja|霊元天皇}} , the 112th Emperor (died {{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year }} ). * {{ill|Tenmei|ja|天明}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1782|ja|1782nd year }} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} ) – {{ill|Aizawa Shōshisai|ja|会沢正志斎}} , a Confucian scholar of the Mito Domain (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōhō|ja|康保}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|967|ja|967th year }} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Murakami|ja|村上天皇}} , the 62nd Emperor (born {{ill|926|ja|926年}} ). * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336年}} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}} ) – {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1294|ja|1294th year }} ). == See Also ==

== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōhō|ja|康保}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|967|ja|967th year }} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Murakami|ja|村上天皇}} , the 62nd Emperor (born {{ill|926|ja|926th year }} ). * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336th year }} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}} ) – {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1294|ja|1294th year }} ).

[[sn:May 25 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 25일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月25日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 25일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿五]] [[zh:五月廿五]] [[en:draft:May 25 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1170|ja|1170th year }} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Hidetaka|ja|藤原秀衡}} of Ōshū was appointed as {{ill|Chinju-fu Shogun|ja|鎮守府将軍|lt=Chinju-fu Shogun}} by the Imperial Court. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1333|ja|1333rd year }} {{ill|July 7|ja|7月7日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon}} of the Northern Court abdicated in favor of {{ill|Emperor Godaigo|ja|後醍醐天皇|lt=Emperor Godaigo}} of the Southern Court, temporarily uniting the Nanboku-chō period. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336th year }} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Minatogawa|ja|湊川の戦い|lt=Battle of Minatogawa}} : {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji}} defeated {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成}} , who, along with his clan, committed suicide.
== Births == * {{ill|Kakki|ja|Kakitsu}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1442|ja|1442nd year }} {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gotomimon|ja|後土御門天皇}} , the 103rd Emperor (died {{ill|1500|ja|1500th year }} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654th year }} {{ill|July 9|ja|7月9日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reigen|ja|霊元天皇}} , the 112th Emperor (died {{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year }} ). * {{ill|Tenmei|ja|天明}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1782|ja|1782nd year }} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} ) – {{ill|Aizawa Shōshisai|ja|会沢正志斎}} , a Confucian scholar of the Mito Domain (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōhō|ja|康保}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|967|ja|967th year }} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Murakami|ja|村上天皇}} , the 62nd Emperor (born {{ill|926|ja|926th year }} ). * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336th year }} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}} ) – {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1294|ja|1294th year }} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|24|5|26|4|25|6|5|0525}}

== Events == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1170|ja|1170th year }} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Hidetaka|ja|藤原秀衡}} of Ōshū was appointed as {{ill|Chinju-fu Shogun|ja|鎮守府将軍|lt=Chinju-fu Shogun}} by the Imperial Court. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 3rd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1333|ja|1333rd year }} {{ill|July 7|ja|7月7日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon}} of the Northern Court abdicated in favor of {{ill|Emperor Godaigo|ja|後醍醐天皇|lt=Emperor Godaigo}} of the Southern Court, temporarily uniting the Nanboku-chō period. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336th year }} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Minatogawa|ja|湊川の戦い|lt=Battle of Minatogawa}} : {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji}} defeated {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成}} , who, along with his clan, committed suicide.
== Births == * {{ill|Kakki|ja|Kakitsu}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1442|ja|1442nd year }} {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gotomimon|ja|後土御門天皇}} , the 103rd Emperor (died {{ill|1500|ja|1500th year }} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654th year }} {{ill|July 9|ja|7月9日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reigen|ja|霊元天皇}} , the 112th Emperor (died {{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year }} ). * {{ill|Tenmei|ja|天明}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1782|ja|1782nd year }} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} ) – {{ill|Aizawa Shōshisai|ja|会沢正志斎}} , a Confucian scholar of the Mito Domain (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōhō|ja|康保}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|967|ja|967th year }} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Murakami|ja|村上天皇}} , the 62nd Emperor (born {{ill|926|ja|926th year }} ). * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336th year }} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}} ) – {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1294|ja|1294th year }} ).
== See Also ==

== Births == * {{ill|Kakki|ja|Kakitsu}} 2nd Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1442|ja|1442nd year }} {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gotomimon|ja|後土御門天皇}} , the 103rd Emperor (died {{ill|1500|ja|1500th year }} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654th year }} {{ill|July 9|ja|7月9日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reigen|ja|霊元天皇}} , the 112th Emperor (died {{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year }} ). * {{ill|Tenmei|ja|天明}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1782|ja|1782nd year }} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} ) – {{ill|Aizawa Shōshisai|ja|会沢正志斎}} , a Confucian scholar of the Mito Domain (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōhō|ja|康保}} 4th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|967|ja|967th year }} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Murakami|ja|村上天皇}} , the 62nd Emperor (born {{ill|926|ja|926th year }} ). * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen}} 1st Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336th year }} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}} ) – {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1294|ja|1294th year }} ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2nd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1170|ja|1170th year }} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Hidetaka|ja|藤原秀衡}} of Ōshū was appointed as {{ill|Chinju-fu Shogun|ja|鎮守府将軍|lt=Chinju-fu Shogun}} by the Imperial Court. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 3rd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1333|ja|1333rd year }} {{ill|July 7|ja|7月7日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon}} of the Northern Court abdicated in favor of {{ill|Emperor Godaigo|ja|後醍醐天皇|lt=Emperor Godaigo}} of the Southern Court, temporarily uniting the Nanboku-chō period. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336th year }} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Minatogawa|ja|湊川の戦い|lt=Battle of Minatogawa}} : {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji}} defeated {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成}} , who, along with his clan, committed suicide.
== Births == * {{ill|Kakki|ja|Kakitsu}} 2nd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1442|ja|1442nd year }} {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gotomimon|ja|後土御門天皇}} , the 103rd Emperor (died {{ill|1500|ja|1500th year }} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654th year }} {{ill|July 9|ja|7月9日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reigen|ja|霊元天皇}} , the 112th Emperor (died {{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year }} ). * {{ill|Tenmei|ja|天明}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1782|ja|1782nd year }} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} ) – {{ill|Aizawa Shōshisai|ja|会沢正志斎}} , a Confucian scholar of the Mito Domain (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōhō|ja|康保}} 4th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|967|ja|967th year }} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Murakami|ja|村上天皇}} , the 62nd Emperor (born {{ill|926|ja|926th year }} ). * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336th year }} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}} ) – {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1294|ja|1294th year }} ).

revision.text:
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿五]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応|12=draft}} 2nd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1170|ja|1170th year|12=draft}} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Hidetaka|ja|藤原秀衡|12=draft}} of Ōshū was appointed as {{ill|Chinju-fu Shogun|ja|鎮守府将軍|lt=Chinju-fu Shogun|12=draft}} by the Imperial Court. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|12=draft}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘|12=draft}} 3rd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1333|ja|1333rd year|12=draft}} {{ill|July 7|ja|7月7日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon|12=draft}} of the Northern Court abdicated in favor of {{ill|Emperor Godaigo|ja|後醍醐天皇|lt=Emperor Godaigo|12=draft}} of the Southern Court, temporarily uniting the Nanboku-chō period. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|12=draft}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336th year|12=draft}} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Minatogawa|ja|湊川の戦い|lt=Battle of Minatogawa|12=draft}} : {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|12=draft}} defeated {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成|12=draft}} , who, along with his clan, committed suicide.
== Births == * {{ill|Kakki|ja|Kakitsu|12=draft}} 2nd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1442|ja|1442nd year|12=draft}} {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gotomimon|ja|後土御門天皇|12=draft}} , the 103rd Emperor (died {{ill|1500|ja|1500th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応|12=draft}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654th year|12=draft}} {{ill|July 9|ja|7月9日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reigen|ja|霊元天皇|12=draft}} , the 112th Emperor (died {{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenmei|ja|天明|12=draft}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1782|ja|1782nd year|12=draft}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Aizawa Shōshisai|ja|会沢正志斎|12=draft}} , a Confucian scholar of the Mito Domain (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōhō|ja|康保|12=draft}} 4th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|967|ja|967th year|12=draft}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Murakami|ja|村上天皇|12=draft}} , the 62nd Emperor (born {{ill|926|ja|926th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|12=draft}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336th year|12=draft}} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成|12=draft}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1294|ja|1294th year|12=draft}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|24|5|26|4|25|6|5|0525}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿五]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿五]]

revision.text:
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿五]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft|12=draft}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1170|ja|1170th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Hidetaka|ja|藤原秀衡|12=draft|12=draft}} of Ōshū was appointed as {{ill|Chinju-fu Shogun|ja|鎮守府将軍|lt=Chinju-fu Shogun|12=draft|12=draft}} by the Imperial Court. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1333|ja|1333rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 7|ja|7月7日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon|12=draft|12=draft}} of the Northern Court abdicated in favor of {{ill|Emperor Godaigo|ja|後醍醐天皇|lt=Emperor Godaigo|12=draft|12=draft}} of the Southern Court, temporarily uniting the Nanboku-chō period. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Minatogawa|ja|湊川の戦い|lt=Battle of Minatogawa|12=draft|12=draft}} : {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|12=draft|12=draft}} defeated {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成|12=draft|12=draft}} , who, along with his clan, committed suicide.
== Births == * {{ill|Kakki|ja|Kakitsu|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1442|ja|1442nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gotomimon|ja|後土御門天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 103rd Emperor (died {{ill|1500|ja|1500th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 9|ja|7月9日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reigen|ja|霊元天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 112th Emperor (died {{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenmei|ja|天明|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1782|ja|1782nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Aizawa Shōshisai|ja|会沢正志斎|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Confucian scholar of the Mito Domain (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōhō|ja|康保|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|967|ja|967th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Murakami|ja|村上天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 62nd Emperor (born {{ill|926|ja|926th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1294|ja|1294th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|24|5|26|4|25|6|5|0525}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿五]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿五]]

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1170|ja|1170th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Hidetaka|ja|藤原秀衡|12=draft|12=draft}} of Ōshū was appointed as {{ill|Chinju-fu Shogun|ja|鎮守府将軍|lt=Chinju-fu Shogun|12=draft|12=draft}} by the Imperial Court. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1333|ja|1333rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 7|ja|7月7日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon|12=draft|12=draft}} of the Northern Court abdicated in favor of {{ill|Emperor Godaigo|ja|後醍醐天皇|lt=Emperor Godaigo|12=draft|12=draft}} of the Southern Court, temporarily uniting the Nanboku-chō period. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Minatogawa|ja|湊川の戦い|lt=Battle of Minatogawa|12=draft|12=draft}} : {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|12=draft|12=draft}} defeated {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成|12=draft|12=draft}} , who, along with his clan, committed suicide.
== Births == * {{ill|Kakki|ja|Kakitsu|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1442|ja|1442nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gotomimon|ja|後土御門天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 103rd Emperor (died {{ill|1500|ja|1500th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 9|ja|7月9日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reigen|ja|霊元天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 112th Emperor (died {{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenmei|ja|天明|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1782|ja|1782nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Aizawa Shōshisai|ja|会沢正志斎|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Confucian scholar of the Mito Domain (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōhō|ja|康保|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|967|ja|967th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Murakami|ja|村上天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 62nd Emperor (born {{ill|926|ja|926th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1294|ja|1294th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

revision.text:
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿五]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft|12=draft}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1170|ja|1170th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 10|ja|7月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Hidetaka|ja|藤原秀衡|12=draft|12=draft}} of Ōshū was appointed as {{ill|Chinju-fu Shogun|ja|鎮守府将軍|lt=Chinju-fu Shogun|12=draft|12=draft}} by the Imperial Court. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1333|ja|1333rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 7|ja|7月7日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon|12=draft|12=draft}} of the Northern Court abdicated in favor of {{ill|Emperor Godaigo|ja|後醍醐天皇|lt=Emperor Godaigo|12=draft|12=draft}} of the Southern Court, temporarily uniting the Nanboku-chō period. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Minatogawa|ja|湊川の戦い|lt=Battle of Minatogawa|12=draft|12=draft}} : {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|12=draft|12=draft}} defeated {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成|12=draft|12=draft}} , who, along with his clan, committed suicide.
== Births == * {{ill|Kakki|ja|Kakitsu|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1442|ja|1442nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 3|ja|7月3日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gotomimon|ja|後土御門天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 103rd Emperor (died {{ill|1500|ja|1500th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 9|ja|7月9日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reigen|ja|霊元天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 112th Emperor (died {{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenmei|ja|天明|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1782|ja|1782nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Aizawa Shōshisai|ja|会沢正志斎|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Confucian scholar of the Mito Domain (died {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōhō|ja|康保|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|967|ja|967th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 5|ja|7月5日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Murakami|ja|村上天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 62nd Emperor (born {{ill|926|ja|926th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1336|ja|1336th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|ja|楠木正成|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1294|ja|1294th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|24|5|26|4|25|6|5|0525}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月25日'''は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の25日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[嘉応]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1170年]][[7月10日]]） - 奥州の[[藤原秀衡]]が朝廷から[[鎮守府将軍]]に任命される * [[正慶]]2年/[[元弘]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1333年]][[7月7日]]） - 北朝の[[光厳天皇]]が南朝の[[後醍醐天皇]]に譲位し一旦[[南北朝時代 (日本)|南北朝]]が合一 * [[正慶]]5年/[[延元]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1336年]][[7月4日]]） - [[湊川の戦い]]。[[足利尊氏]]が[[楠木正成]]を破る。正成は一族とともに自害
== 誕生日 == * [[嘉吉]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1442年]][[7月3日]]） - [[後土御門天皇]]、103代[[天皇]]（+ [[1500年]]） * [[承応]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1654年]][[7月9日]]） - [[霊元天皇]]、112代天皇（+ [[1732年]]） * [[天明]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1782年]][[7月5日]]） - [[会沢正志斎]]、[[水戸藩]]の[[儒学者]]（+ [[1863年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[康保]]4年（ユリウス暦[[967年]][[7月5日]]） - [[村上天皇]]、62代天皇（* [[926年]]） * 正慶5年/延元元年（ユリウス暦1336年7月4日） - 楠木正成、[[武将]]（* [[1294年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|24|5|26|4|25|6|5|0525}}

== できごと == * [[嘉応]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1170年]][[7月10日]]） - 奥州の[[藤原秀衡]]が朝廷から[[鎮守府将軍]]に任命される * [[正慶]]2年/[[元弘]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1333年]][[7月7日]]） - 北朝の[[光厳天皇]]が南朝の[[後醍醐天皇]]に譲位し一旦[[南北朝時代 (日本)|南北朝]]が合一 * [[正慶]]5年/[[延元]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1336年]][[7月4日]]） - [[湊川の戦い]]。[[足利尊氏]]が[[楠木正成]]を破る。正成は一族とともに自害

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839582]] Wikidata name: 25th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 25|qq=May 25}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 25일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * [[:en:Kaō (era)|Kaō]] 2nd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1170|1170]] [[:en:July 10|July 10]] ) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Hidehira|Fujiwara Hidetaka]] of Ōshū was appointed as [[:en:Chinjufu shōgun|Chinju-fu Shogun]] by the Imperial Court. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 2nd Year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kōgon|Emperor Kōgon]] of the Northern Court abdicated in favor of [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Emperor Godaigo]] of the Southern Court, temporarily uniting the Nanboku-chō period. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]] ) – The [[:en:Battle of Minatogawa|Battle of Minatogawa]] : {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} defeated [[:en:Kusunoki Masashige|Kusunoki Masashige]] , who, along with his clan, committed suicide.
== Births == * {{ill|Kakki|ja|Kakitsu|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1442|1442]] [[:en:July 3|July 3]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Tsuchimikado|Emperor Gotomimon]] , the 103rd Emperor (died [[:en:1500|1500]] ). * [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Shōō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:July 9|July 9]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Reigen|Emperor Reigen]] , the 112th Emperor (died [[:en:1732|1732]] ). * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1782|1782]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] ) – [[:en:Aizawa Seishisai|Aizawa Seishisai]] , a Confucian scholar of the Mito Domain (died [[:en:1863|1863]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōhō|Kōhō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:967|967]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Murakami|Emperor Murakami]] , the 62nd Emperor (born [[:en:926|926]] ). * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]] ) – [[:en:Kusunoki Masashige|Kusunoki Masashige]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1294|1294]] ).
== See Also ==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月25日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 25일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月廿五]][[zh:五月廿五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839582]] Wikidata name: 25th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 25|qq=May 25}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 25일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * [[:en:Kaō (era)|Kaō]] 2nd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1170|1170]] [[:en:July 10|July 10]] ) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Hidehira|Fujiwara Hidetaka]] of Ōshū was appointed as [[:en:Chinjufu shōgun|Chinju-fu Shogun]] by the Imperial Court. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 2nd Year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kōgon|Emperor Kōgon]] of the Northern Court abdicated in favor of [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Emperor Godaigo]] of the Southern Court, temporarily uniting the Nanboku-chō period. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]] ) – The [[:en:Battle of Minatogawa|Battle of Minatogawa]] : {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} defeated [[:en:Kusunoki Masashige|Kusunoki Masashige]] , who, along with his clan, committed suicide.
== Births == * {{ill|Kakki|ja|Kakitsu|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1442|1442]] [[:en:July 3|July 3]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Tsuchimikado|Emperor Gotomimon]] , the 103rd Emperor (died [[:en:1500|1500]] ). * [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Shōō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:July 9|July 9]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Reigen|Emperor Reigen]] , the 112th Emperor (died [[:en:1732|1732]] ). * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1782|1782]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] ) – [[:en:Aizawa Seishisai|Aizawa Seishisai]] , a Confucian scholar of the Mito Domain (died [[:en:1863|1863]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōhō|Kōhō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:967|967]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Murakami|Emperor Murakami]] , the 62nd Emperor (born [[:en:926|926]] ). * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]] ) – [[:en:Kusunoki Masashige|Kusunoki Masashige]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1294|1294]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月25日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 25일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿五]][[zh:五月廿五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839582]] Wikidata name: 25th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 25|qq=May 25}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 25일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * [[:en:Kaō (era)|Kaō]] 2nd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1170|1170]] [[:en:July 10|July 10]] ) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Hidehira|Fujiwara Hidetaka]] of Ōshū was appointed as [[:en:Chinjufu shōgun|Chinju-fu Shogun]] by the Imperial Court. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 2nd Year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kōgon|Emperor Kōgon]] of the Northern Court abdicated in favor of [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Emperor Godaigo]] of the Southern Court, temporarily uniting the Nanboku-chō period. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]] ) – The [[:en:Battle of Minatogawa|Battle of Minatogawa]] : {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} defeated [[:en:Kusunoki Masashige|Kusunoki Masashige]] , who, along with his clan, committed suicide.
== Births == * {{ill|Kakki|ja|Kakitsu|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1442|1442]] [[:en:July 3|July 3]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Tsuchimikado|Emperor Gotomimon]] , the 103rd Emperor (died [[:en:1500|1500]] ). * [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Shōō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:July 9|July 9]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Reigen|Emperor Reigen]] , the 112th Emperor (died [[:en:1732|1732]] ). * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1782|1782]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] ) – [[:en:Aizawa Seishisai|Aizawa Seishisai]] , a Confucian scholar of the Mito Domain (died [[:en:1863|1863]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōhō|Kōhō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:967|967]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Murakami|Emperor Murakami]] , the 62nd Emperor (born [[:en:926|926]] ). * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]] ) – [[:en:Kusunoki Masashige|Kusunoki Masashige]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1294|1294]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月25日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 25일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿五]][[zh:五月廿五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839582]] Wikidata name: 25th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 25|qq=May 25}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 25일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * [[:en:Kaō (era)|Kaō]] 2nd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1170|1170]] [[:en:July 10|July 10]] ) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Hidehira|Fujiwara Hidetaka]] of Ōshū was appointed as [[:en:Chinjufu shōgun|Chinju-fu Shogun]] by the Imperial Court. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 2nd Year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kōgon|Emperor Kōgon]] of the Northern Court abdicated in favor of [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Emperor Godaigo]] of the Southern Court, temporarily uniting the Nanboku-chō period. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]] ) – The [[:en:Battle of Minatogawa|Battle of Minatogawa]] : {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} defeated [[:en:Kusunoki Masashige|Kusunoki Masashige]] , who, along with his clan, committed suicide.
== Births == * {{ill|Kakki|ja|Kakitsu|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1442|1442]] [[:en:July 3|July 3]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Tsuchimikado|Emperor Gotomimon]] , the 103rd Emperor (died [[:en:1500|1500]] ). * [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Shōō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:July 9|July 9]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Reigen|Emperor Reigen]] , the 112th Emperor (died [[:en:1732|1732]] ). * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1782|1782]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] ) – [[:en:Aizawa Seishisai|Aizawa Seishisai]] , a Confucian scholar of the Mito Domain (died [[:en:1863|1863]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōhō|Kōhō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:967|967]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Murakami|Emperor Murakami]] , the 62nd Emperor (born [[:en:926|926]] ). * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]] ) – [[:en:Kusunoki Masashige|Kusunoki Masashige]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1294|1294]] ).
