Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 25일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * [[:en:Kaō (era)|Kaō]] 2nd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1170|1170]] [[:en:July 10|July 10]] ) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Hidehira|Fujiwara Hidetaka]] of Ōshū was appointed as [[:en:Chinjufu shōgun|Chinju-fu Shogun]] by the Imperial Court. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 2nd Year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kōgon|Emperor Kōgon]] of the Northern Court abdicated in favor of [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Emperor Godaigo]] of the Southern Court, temporarily uniting the Nanboku-chō period. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]] ) – The [[:en:Battle of Minatogawa|Battle of Minatogawa]] : {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} defeated [[:en:Kusunoki Masashige|Kusunoki Masashige]] , who, along with his clan, committed suicide.
== Births == * {{ill|Kakki|ja|Kakitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1442|1442]] [[:en:July 3|July 3]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Tsuchimikado|Emperor Gotomimon]] , the 103rd Emperor (died [[:en:1500|1500]] ). * [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Shōō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:July 9|July 9]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Reigen|Emperor Reigen]] , the 112th Emperor (died [[:en:1732|1732]] ). * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1782|1782]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] ) – [[:en:Aizawa Seishisai|Aizawa Seishisai]] , a Confucian scholar of the Mito Domain (died [[:en:1863|1863]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōhō|Kōhō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:967|967]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Murakami|Emperor Murakami]] , the 62nd Emperor (born [[:en:926|926]] ). * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]] ) – [[:en:Kusunoki Masashige|Kusunoki Masashige]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1294|1294]] ).
== See Also ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * [[:en:Kaō (era)|Kaō]] 2nd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1170|1170]] [[:en:July 10|July 10]] ) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Hidehira|Fujiwara Hidetaka]] of Ōshū was appointed as [[:en:Chinjufu shōgun|Chinju-fu Shogun]] by the Imperial Court. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 2nd Year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kōgon|Emperor Kōgon]] of the Northern Court abdicated in favor of [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Emperor Godaigo]] of the Southern Court, temporarily uniting the Nanboku-chō period. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]] ) – The [[:en:Battle of Minatogawa|Battle of Minatogawa]] : {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} defeated [[:en:Kusunoki Masashige|Kusunoki Masashige]] , who, along with his clan, committed suicide.
== Births == * {{ill|Kakki|ja|Kakitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1442|1442]] [[:en:July 3|July 3]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Tsuchimikado|Emperor Gotomimon]] , the 103rd Emperor (died [[:en:1500|1500]] ). * [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Shōō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:July 9|July 9]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Reigen|Emperor Reigen]] , the 112th Emperor (died [[:en:1732|1732]] ). * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1782|1782]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] ) – [[:en:Aizawa Seishisai|Aizawa Seishisai]] , a Confucian scholar of the Mito Domain (died [[:en:1863|1863]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōhō|Kōhō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:967|967]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Murakami|Emperor Murakami]] , the 62nd Emperor (born [[:en:926|926]] ). * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]] ) – [[:en:Kusunoki Masashige|Kusunoki Masashige]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1294|1294]] ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * [[:en:Kaō (era)|Kaō]] 2nd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1170|1170]] [[:en:July 10|July 10]] ) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Hidehira|Fujiwara Hidetaka]] of Ōshū was appointed as [[:en:Chinjufu shōgun|Chinju-fu Shogun]] by the Imperial Court. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 2nd Year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kōgon|Emperor Kōgon]] of the Northern Court abdicated in favor of [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Emperor Godaigo]] of the Southern Court, temporarily uniting the Nanboku-chō period. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]] ) – The [[:en:Battle of Minatogawa|Battle of Minatogawa]] : {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} defeated [[:en:Kusunoki Masashige|Kusunoki Masashige]] , who, along with his clan, committed suicide.
== Births == * {{ill|Kakki|ja|Kakitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1442|1442]] [[:en:July 3|July 3]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Tsuchimikado|Emperor Gotomimon]] , the 103rd Emperor (died [[:en:1500|1500]] ). * [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Shōō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:July 9|July 9]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Reigen|Emperor Reigen]] , the 112th Emperor (died [[:en:1732|1732]] ). * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1782|1782]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] ) – [[:en:Aizawa Seishisai|Aizawa Seishisai]] , a Confucian scholar of the Mito Domain (died [[:en:1863|1863]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōhō|Kōhō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:967|967]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Murakami|Emperor Murakami]] , the 62nd Emperor (born [[:en:926|926]] ). * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]] ) – [[:en:Kusunoki Masashige|Kusunoki Masashige]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1294|1294]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|24|5|26|4|25|6|5|0525|qq=}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * [[:en:Kaō (era)|Kaō]] 2nd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1170|1170]] [[:en:July 10|July 10]] ) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Hidehira|Fujiwara Hidetaka]] of Ōshū was appointed as [[:en:Chinjufu shōgun|Chinju-fu Shogun]] by the Imperial Court. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 2nd Year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kōgon|Emperor Kōgon]] of the Northern Court abdicated in favor of [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Emperor Godaigo]] of the Southern Court, temporarily uniting the Nanboku-chō period. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]] ) – The [[:en:Battle of Minatogawa|Battle of Minatogawa]] : {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} defeated [[:en:Kusunoki Masashige|Kusunoki Masashige]] , who, along with his clan, committed suicide.
== Births == * {{ill|Kakki|ja|Kakitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1442|1442]] [[:en:July 3|July 3]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Tsuchimikado|Emperor Gotomimon]] , the 103rd Emperor (died [[:en:1500|1500]] ). * [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Shōō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:July 9|July 9]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Reigen|Emperor Reigen]] , the 112th Emperor (died [[:en:1732|1732]] ). * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1782|1782]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] ) – [[:en:Aizawa Seishisai|Aizawa Seishisai]] , a Confucian scholar of the Mito Domain (died [[:en:1863|1863]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōhō|Kōhō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:967|967]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Murakami|Emperor Murakami]] , the 62nd Emperor (born [[:en:926|926]] ). * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]] ) – [[:en:Kusunoki Masashige|Kusunoki Masashige]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1294|1294]] ).

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 25일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * [[:en:Kaō (era)|Kaō]] 2nd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1170|1170]] [[:en:July 10|July 10]] ) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Hidehira|Fujiwara Hidetaka]] of Ōshū was appointed as [[:en:Chinjufu shōgun|Chinju-fu Shogun]] by the Imperial Court. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 2nd Year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kōgon|Emperor Kōgon]] of the Northern Court abdicated in favor of [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Emperor Godaigo]] of the Southern Court, temporarily uniting the Nanboku-chō period. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]] ) – The [[:en:Battle of Minatogawa|Battle of Minatogawa]] : {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} defeated [[:en:Kusunoki Masashige|Kusunoki Masashige]] , who, along with his clan, committed suicide.
== Births == * {{ill|Kakki|ja|Kakitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1442|1442]] [[:en:July 3|July 3]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Tsuchimikado|Emperor Gotomimon]] , the 103rd Emperor (died [[:en:1500|1500]] ). * [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Shōō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:July 9|July 9]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Reigen|Emperor Reigen]] , the 112th Emperor (died [[:en:1732|1732]] ). * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1782|1782]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] ) – [[:en:Aizawa Seishisai|Aizawa Seishisai]] , a Confucian scholar of the Mito Domain (died [[:en:1863|1863]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōhō|Kōhō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:967|967]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Murakami|Emperor Murakami]] , the 62nd Emperor (born [[:en:926|926]] ). * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]] ) – [[:en:Kusunoki Masashige|Kusunoki Masashige]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1294|1294]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|24|5|26|4|25|6|5|0525|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月25日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 25일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月廿五]][[zh:五月廿五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月25日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 25일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月廿五]][[zh:五月廿五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月25日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 25일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿五]][[zh:五月廿五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839582]] Wikidata name: 25th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 25|qq=May 25}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 25일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * [[:en:Kaō (era)|Kaō]] 2nd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1170|1170]] [[:en:July 10|July 10]] ) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Hidehira|Fujiwara Hidetaka]] of Ōshū was appointed as [[:en:Chinjufu shōgun|Chinju-fu Shogun]] by the Imperial Court. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 2nd Year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kōgon|Emperor Kōgon]] of the Northern Court abdicated in favor of [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Emperor Godaigo]] of the Southern Court, temporarily uniting the Nanboku-chō period. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]] ) – The [[:en:Battle of Minatogawa|Battle of Minatogawa]] : {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} defeated [[:en:Kusunoki Masashige|Kusunoki Masashige]] , who, along with his clan, committed suicide.
== Births == * {{ill|Kakki|ja|Kakitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1442|1442]] [[:en:July 3|July 3]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Tsuchimikado|Emperor Gotomimon]] , the 103rd Emperor (died [[:en:1500|1500]] ). * [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Shōō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:July 9|July 9]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Reigen|Emperor Reigen]] , the 112th Emperor (died [[:en:1732|1732]] ). * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1782|1782]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] ) – [[:en:Aizawa Seishisai|Aizawa Seishisai]] , a Confucian scholar of the Mito Domain (died [[:en:1863|1863]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōhō|Kōhō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:967|967]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Murakami|Emperor Murakami]] , the 62nd Emperor (born [[:en:926|926]] ). * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]] ) – [[:en:Kusunoki Masashige|Kusunoki Masashige]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1294|1294]] ).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 25일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * [[:en:Kaō (era)|Kaō]] 2nd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1170|1170]] [[:en:July 10|July 10]] ) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Hidehira|Fujiwara Hidetaka]] of Ōshū was appointed as [[:en:Chinjufu shōgun|Chinju-fu Shogun]] by the Imperial Court. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 2nd Year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 3rd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kōgon|Emperor Kōgon]] of the Northern Court abdicated in favor of [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Emperor Godaigo]] of the Southern Court, temporarily uniting the Nanboku-chō period. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]] ) – The [[:en:Battle of Minatogawa|Battle of Minatogawa]] : {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} defeated [[:en:Kusunoki Masashige|Kusunoki Masashige]] , who, along with his clan, committed suicide.
== Births == * {{ill|Kakki|ja|Kakitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1442|1442]] [[:en:July 3|July 3]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Tsuchimikado|Emperor Gotomimon]] , the 103rd Emperor (died [[:en:1500|1500]] ). * [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Shōō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:July 9|July 9]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Reigen|Emperor Reigen]] , the 112th Emperor (died [[:en:1732|1732]] ). * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1782|1782]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] ) – [[:en:Aizawa Seishisai|Aizawa Seishisai]] , a Confucian scholar of the Mito Domain (died [[:en:1863|1863]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōhō|Kōhō]] 4th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:967|967]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Murakami|Emperor Murakami]] , the 62nd Emperor (born [[:en:926|926]] ). * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]] ) – [[:en:Kusunoki Masashige|Kusunoki Masashige]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1294|1294]] ).

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 25일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * {{ill|Kaō (era)|en|Kaō (era)|WD=Q1150842|lt=Kaō}} 2nd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1170|en|1170|WD=Q19681|lt=1170}} {{ill|July 10|en|July 10|WD=Q2689|lt=July 10}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Hidehira|en|Fujiwara no Hidehira|WD=Q3090625|lt=Fujiwara Hidetaka}} of Ōshū was appointed as invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Genkō (1331–1334)|en|Genkō (1331–1334)|WD=Q1194556|lt=Genkō}} 3rd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月25日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 25일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿五]][[zh:五月廿五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月25日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 25일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿五]][[zh:五月廿五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月25日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 25일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿五]][[zh:五月廿五]]
{{Not to be confused with|May 25|qq=May 25}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 25일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * {{ill|Kaō (era)|en|Kaō (era)|WD=Q1150842|lt=Kaō}} 2nd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1170|en|1170|WD=Q19681|lt=1170}} {{ill|July 10|en|July 10|WD=Q2689|lt=July 10}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Hidehira|en|Fujiwara no Hidehira|WD=Q3090625|lt=Fujiwara Hidetaka}} of Ōshū was appointed as {{ill|Chinjufu shōgun|en|Chinjufu shōgun|WD=Q2700052|lt=Chinju-fu Shogun}} by the Imperial Court. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Genkō (1331–1334)|en|Genkō (1331–1334)|WD=Q1194556|lt=Genkō}} 3rd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1333|en|1333|WD=Q6004|lt=1333}} {{ill|July 7|en|July 7|WD=Q2694|lt=July 7}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|en|Emperor Kōgon|WD=Q471885|lt=Emperor Kōgon}} of the Northern Court abdicated in favor of {{ill|Emperor Go-Daigo|en|Emperor Go-Daigo|WD=Q313942|lt=Emperor Godaigo}} of the Southern Court, temporarily uniting the Nanboku-chō period. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1336|en|1336|WD=Q6028|lt=1336}} {{ill|July 4|en|July 4|WD=Q2698|lt=July 4}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Minatogawa|en|Battle of Minatogawa|WD=Q114620|lt=Battle of Minatogawa}} : {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} defeated {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|en|Kusunoki Masashige|WD=Q382234|lt=Kusunoki Masashige}} , who, along with his clan, committed suicide.
== Births == * {{ill|Kakki|ja|Kakitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1442|en|1442|WD=Q6411|lt=1442}} {{ill|July 3|en|July 3|WD=Q2699|lt=July 3}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Tsuchimikado|en|Emperor Go-Tsuchimikado|WD=Q380623|lt=Emperor Gotomimon}} , the 103rd Emperor (died {{ill|1500|en|1500|WD=Q6126|lt=1500}} ). * {{ill|Jōō (Edo period)|en|Jōō (Edo period)|WD=Q1145081|lt=Shōō}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1654|en|1654|WD=Q6970|lt=1654}} {{ill|July 9|en|July 9|WD=Q2690|lt=July 9}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reigen|en|Emperor Reigen|WD=Q313808|lt=Emperor Reigen}} , the 112th Emperor (died {{ill|1732|en|1732|WD=Q6966|lt=1732}} ). * {{ill|Tenmei|en|Tenmei|WD=Q1194121|lt=Tenmei}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1782|en|1782|WD=Q7740|lt=1782}} {{ill|July 5|en|July 5|WD=Q2696|lt=July 5}} ) – {{ill|Aizawa Seishisai|en|Aizawa Seishisai|WD=Q2090901|lt=Aizawa Seishisai}} , a Confucian scholar of the Mito Domain (died {{ill|1863|en|1863|WD=Q7701|lt=1863}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōhō|en|Kōhō|WD=Q1327182|lt=Kōhō}} 4th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|967|en|967|WD=Q23699|lt=967}} {{ill|July 5|en|July 5|WD=Q2696|lt=July 5}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Murakami|en|Emperor Murakami|WD=Q374015|lt=Emperor Murakami}} , the 62nd Emperor (born {{ill|926|en|926|WD=Q24369|lt=926}} ). * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 5th Year / {{ill|Engei|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|WD=Q1194159|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1194159}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1336|en|1336|WD=Q6028|lt=1336}} {{ill|July 4|en|July 4|WD=Q2698|lt=July 4}} ) – {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|en|Kusunoki Masashige|WD=Q382234|lt=Kusunoki Masashige}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1294|en|1294|WD=Q5559|lt=1294}} ).
